title: Naga Kannike
desc: Maanya is overjoyed when Manish finally returns. However, Manish makes a shocking announcement to Maanya that changes the fate of their relationship.

title: Ishtakamya
desc: Doctor Aakarsh, who is separated from his wife, Adithi, falls in love with another girl, Acchari. He is caught in a fix when his estranged wife comes back.

title: Jhansi Ki Rani
desc: Vahini travels to a cow-house with Manu and aides when they see Captain Smith whipping a fakir at a crossroad after learning he's encouraging locals to revolt.

title: Jaganmathe
desc: Sakthi is blessed with powers from the Goddess JAGANMATHE. Adored by the villagers for her abilities, she has grown up under the strict watch of her sister, who is her total opposite. Her life takes a turn when she meets an atheist doctor.

title: Jaganmathe
desc: Sakthi is blessed with powers from the Goddess JAGANMATHE. Adored by the villagers for her abilities, she has grown up under the strict watch of her sister, who is her total opposite. Her life takes a turn when she meets an atheist doctor.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: Varun Vaibhav visits Sanjana's house and apologises to her and the family for all his misdeeds. Unable to accept his betrayal, Sanjana lashes out at him, refuses for compromise and locks herself in a room.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: After managing to have a conversation with Sanjana, Varun Vaibhav pleads forgiveness for deceiving her and Inchara.

title: Silli Lalli
desc: Vittal treats Lalithamba when she complains about a severe stomach ache. However, Lalithamba fears the side effects and approaches Dr Sham instead.

title: Silli Lalli
desc: Lalithamba brings a woman to Vittal's clinic to treat her stomach ache. However, the woman makes a strange request to Vittal.

title: Papa Pandu
desc: Pandu is in for a roller-coaster ride when his controlling wife meets his equally dominant daughter-in-law.

desc: Pandu is in for a roller-coaster ride when his controlling wife meets his equally dominant daughter-in-law.

title: Jhansi Ki Rani
desc: Vahini travels to a cow-house with Manu and aides when they see Captain Smith whipping a fakir at a crossroad after learning he's encouraging locals to revolt.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: Chanchala questions Chiranthan about Veda Murthy and the stolen medicines which surprises him! When asked how Chanchala had learned about it, she reveals that Janaki had told her everything.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: While handing over the Demand Draft given by Veda Murthy to Niranjan, Janaki informs him about the confession made by Veda Murthy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: Parvati joins Lord Shiva on a pilgrimage to Amarnath, seeking blessings for a child. However, their journey is threatened by Tarakasura's malevolent scheme, as he sends Rahu and Ketu to obstruct them.

title: Shiva Shakthi
desc: As Tarakasura and his cohorts launch a relentless assault on Kailash, the Devas rise to its defense with unwavering courage. Will their valor and determination be enough to safeguard the sacred abode of Lord Shiva?

title: Gunasundari
desc: Latika is unable to inform Bapu about her decision to divorce Abhimanyu as her grandmother faces an unexpected injury. While her grandmother recovers, she feels dejected about not informing Bapu. Will she make another attempt?

title: Gunasundari
desc: A furious Kamini confronts Abba for giving Latika the advertisement opportunity. Later, as Hema and Latika try to calm Kamini, Latika lends a piece of advice. Will Kamini hear out Latika's advice?

title: Gunasundari
desc: It is finally the time for Latika's photoshoot for the bank's advertisement. Kamini, jealous that Latika has earned this opportunity, wants to destroy her and exclaims the same to Daulatrao. How will Latika successfully carry out the photoshoot?

title: Gunasundari
desc: Latika has the worst time of her life as Daulatrao continues to harass her through the photoshoot. Unable to bear the insults, Latika breaks down into tears. Will Abhimanyu be able to stop Latika from quitting the assignment?

title: Gunasundari
desc: Abhimanyu employs clever tactics and locks Daulat inside a room in order to ensure that Latika's shoot resumes successfully. Furthermore, he motivates Latika to complete the shoot with flying colours. Will Daulat find another way to stall the shoot?

title: Gunasundari
desc: Abhimanyu feels dejected that his boss lashed out at him for visiting Latika's shoot without taking permission. However, Latika finds out about it and tries to comfort him. Will she be able to lift his spirits?

title: Gunasundari
desc: Abhimanyu feels happy as he and Latika forget their past fight and carry on in a normal manner. However, Latika reminds him to inform his father of his decision to participate in the wrestling championship, leaving Abhimanyu worried.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: Devayani visits bank manager Chidanand's house and gifts his wife Sahana a gold set as a goodwill gesture. She then asks Sahana to convince her husband to give them an extension on the loan.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: Upon learning the truth, Madhukar lashes out at Devayani for bribing the bank manager and lying to him about it. On Shyamala's advice, Devayani apologises to Madhukar and tries to justify her actions. But will he accept her justification?

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: Niranjan talks to CSP about the murder his father claims to have committed four years ago. CSP learns the complete details about the murder from Niranjan. In an attempt to solve the murder mystery, CSP tries to connect the dots.

title: Jana Gana Mana
desc: Jhansi, a talented police officer, embarks on a battle against one of the most notorious criminals in Madikeri. Despite several obstacles in her way, she resolves to bring justice and solve the crime by the book.

title: Silli Lalli
desc: After Lalli rebukes her, Silli decides to change her ways and live the life of a saint. Soon, Lalli is surprised after witnessing Silli's transformation.

title: Silli Lalli
desc: Vittal brings his fortune teller friend home upon Lalithamba's insistence. However, the fortune teller makes a chaotic prediction that puts Vittal's home life in trouble.

title: Silli Lalli
desc: Vittal gets annoyed when Lalithamba constantly questions his loyalty. Soon, he decides to get disguised and play a trick on Lalithamba.

title: Silli Lalli
desc: Vittal is infuriated when he learns that he has a doppleganger. Soon, his fury grows tenfold when the doppleganger creates trouble at Vittal's house.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: Chanchala introduces Ujwala to Chiranthan as the new marketing manager of their company, which shocks him. He confronts Chanchala in private for hiring Ujwala without his knowledge and asks her to hold Ujwala's appointment order.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: Sanjana and family members disclose about Varun's deal for compromise and seek Janaki's opinion. Despite suspicious of Varun's true intention, Janaki meets him and questions the reason for his change of mind.

desc: Damayanthi reveals the key trick to win the best doctor award. Soon, Vittal tries to follow her advice and aim for the achievement.

desc: Palli starts to feel lonely when his family neglects him. Soon, the family learns about Palli's predicament and comes up with a bizarre solution.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: Chiranthan rushes to Chandu's house to stop Ujwala from exposing him before Rashmi and Chandu. After preventing Ujwala from revealing the truth, Chiranthan threatens to kill her if she fails to reconsider her decision.

title: Magalu Janaki
desc: Ujwala meets Chiranthan in private and informs about her new plan to expose him. Following day, Chiranthan agrees to marry Ujwala on a condition that she should hand over all the proof to him.
